title: CA May 2026 Exam Registration: Last Day to Apply Without Late Fee is Today!
content:
# CA May 2026 Exam Registration: Last Day to Apply Without Late Fee is Today!

Ek important update hai for all CA Foundation, Intermediate, and Final aspirants! The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) ne May 2026 examinations ke liye registration window open ki thi. Aaj, **March 16, 2026**, without late fee exam form submission ka last day hai.

If you haven't applied yet, make sure to complete your application process online today to avoid any additional charges.

*   **Online Application Start Date:** March 3, 2026
*   **Last Date to Submit Without Late Fee:** March 16, 2026 (today!)
*   **Late Fee Period:** Candidates can still apply with a late fee of ₹600 (or US $10 for overseas centers) from March 17, 2026, to March 19, 2026.
*   **Application Correction Window:** A correction window will be available from March 20, 2026, to March 22, 2026, for making permissible changes in the submitted exam forms.

All eligible candidates for Foundation, Intermediate, and Final Examinations are required to apply online through the ICAI Self Service Portal (SSP) at eservices.icai.org.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.icai.org/post.html?post_id=19803)

*Published on: 16 March 2026*
